scripts.postinstall: npm --prefix core-service install && npm --prefix operations-service install && npm --prefix api-gateway install && npm --prefix frontend install
scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n gateway,core,operations,frontend -c blue,green,magenta,cyan "npm run start:gateway" "npm run start:core" "npm run start:operations" "npm run start:frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build:gateway && npm run build:core && npm run build:operations && npm run build:frontend
scripts.lint: npm run lint:gateway && npm run lint:core && npm run lint:operations && npm run lint:frontend
scripts.test: npm run test:gateway && npm run test:core && npm run test:operations
scripts.db:reset: docker compose down -v && docker compose up -d postgres
scripts.prisma:generate: npm --prefix core-service run prisma:control:generate && npm --prefix operations-service run prisma:branch:generate
scripts.phase2:setup: npm run db:up && npm --prefix operations-service run wait:postgres && npm run prisma:generate && npm run prisma:migrate:control && npm run prisma:migrate:principal && npm run prisma:migrate:norte && npm run prisma:seed:control && npm run prisma:seed:principal && npm run prisma:seed:norte
scripts.phase2:verify: npm --prefix core-service run prisma:control:validate && npm --prefix operations-service run prisma:branch:validate && npm run verify:branch-isolation && npm run lint && npm run test && npm run build
scripts.phase3:verify: npm --prefix core-service run prisma:control:validate && npm run lint && npm run test && npm --prefix api-gateway run test:e2e && npm --prefix core-service run test:e2e && npm --prefix operations-service run test:e2e && npm run build && npm --prefix core-service run auth:test
